teamPrepNotes.note: Strong dive opener sample. Review Control bans before choosing Busan.
Often removes one high-tempo support in sample data.
Use replay archive to compare their Hybrid opener versus Rush teams.
Sample shows mixed poke and dive looks; filter by recent dates in Prep.
